title: Bao Baked Potatoes with Jamaican Twist
description: A flavorful twist on classic baked potatoes, filling them with a spicy Jamaican filling and topping with crispy bao croutons.
instructions: Scrub and poke potatoes with a fork to allow steam to escape.
Rub potatoes with oil and sprinkle with jerk seasoning. Bake for 45 minutes.
Meanwhile, cook bacon until crispy. Chop into small pieces.
In a small bowl, mix together sour cream, scallions, cayenne pepper (if using), and salt.
Remove potatoes from oven and top each with a spoonful of the sour cream mixture, crumbled bacon, and shredded cheese.
Return potatoes to oven and bake for an additional 5-7 minutes, until cheese is melted and bubbly.
Meanwhile, toss bao cubes with a little oil and bake in the oven until crispy.
Remove potatoes from oven and top each with crispy bao croutons and a pat of melted butter.
